PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING, LLC RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT MILLS, LINDA E $5,642.56 PRINCIPAL, $922.91 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,745.47, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING, LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM, CORRECT OR VACATE CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT WERE SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-04-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
